purpose: Make topic binding evaluation count observed wrong-topic substitutions from response text before any future topic repair training.

metric_rules.observed_wrong_topic_count: Count every topic/prototype term present in the assistant response except the requested topic, independent of the primary failure reason.
metric_rules.copy_anchor: Requested topic must appear within the first 12 visible Arabic chars.
metric_rules.reason_precedence: wrong_topic and copy_anchor are independent gates; required_topic_missing must not hide a wrong-topic substitution.
